parameters.query: SELECT file_path, heading, LEFT(content, 500) as content_snippet, metadata->>'type' as type, metadata->>'title' as title, ROUND((1 - (embedding <=> '{{ $json.vectorStr }}'::vector))::numeric, 4) as similarity FROM vault_embeddings WHERE ({{ $json.typeFilter ? "metadata->>'type' = '" + $json.typeFilter + "'" : "TRUE" }}) ORDER BY embedding <=> '{{ $json.vectorStr }}'::vector LIMIT {{ $json.topK }}

SELECT file_path, heading, LEFT(content, 500) as content_snippet, metadata->>'type' as type, metadata->>'title' as title, ROUND((1 - (embedding <=> '{{ $json.vectorStr }}'::vector))::numeric, 4) as similarity FROM vault_embeddings WHERE ({{ $json.typeFilter ? "metadata->>'type' = '" + $json.typeFilter + "'" : "TRUE" }}) ORDER BY embedding <=> '{{ $json.vectorStr }}'::vector LIMIT {{ $json.topK }}
